 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.4","title":"fcp.notion: Search (sensitive)","description":"# fcp.notion: Search (sensitive)

## Goal
Implement workspace search.

## Requirements
- Capability gated.
- Treat results as sensitive.
- Strong redaction.

## Acceptance Criteria
- The functionality described in this bead is implemented with typed schemas + validation (no unstructured “stringly” interfaces).
- Errors map to the FCP error taxonomy with correct retry semantics and no secret/PII leakage.
- Mock-only unit/integration tests cover success paths and common failures and emit structured JSON logs per `flywheel_connectors-1n78.35`.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"SunnyMoose","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-15T08:40:37.996060822Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-03-02T23:36:53.184938Z","closed_at":"2026-03-02T23:36:53.184923Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["connectors","fcp2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.4","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":531,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.4","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"SunnyMoose: Completed Notion Search with sensitive handling.

## Changes
- **connector.rs**: Updated invoke_search to add provenance/taint metadata and PII redaction
  - Results now include sensitivity='workspace_wide', provenance (source, derived, scope), and taint=['external_input', 'cross_workspace']
  - Emails in person properties, created_by, and last_edited_by are redacted to '[redacted]'
  - Added redact_search_result(), redact_person_fields(), and redact_user_email() helpers
  - Updated introspection: risk_level=Medium, dedicated 'notion.search' capability
  - Added 4 unit tests for redaction functions

- **manifest.toml**: Updated search operation
  - Changed capability from 'notion.read' to 'notion.search'
  - Changed risk_level from 'low' to 'medium'
  - Added sensitivity/provenance/taint to output schema
  - Added notion.search rate limit pool
  - Updated interface hash

- **integration.rs**: Added 6 new search sensitivity tests
  - search_includes_sensitivity_metadata
  - search_with_filter
  - search_empty_results
  - search_redacts_person_emails
  - search_requires_search_capability
  - search_redacts_created_by_last_edited_by_property_types

## Validation
- cargo check -p fcp-notion --all-targets ✅
- cargo clippy -p fcp-notion --all-targets -- -D warnings ✅
- cargo fmt --check --package fcp-notion ✅
- cargo test -p fcp-notion --all-targets ✅ (86 tests: 44 unit + 42 integration)","created_at":"2026-03-02T23:36:52Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.5","title":"TEST: Notion Connector Unit/Integration Tests (mock-only)","description":"# TEST: Notion Connector Unit/Integration Tests (mock-only)


## Goal
Validate Notion connector via mock-only tests (pages/databases/search, pagination) with deterministic behavior.

## Must cover
- Manifest determinism + interface_hash.
- Error taxonomy mapping.
- Redaction.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic.
- Structured JSON logs.

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.6","title":"E2E: Notion Connector Compliance Run","description":"# E2E: Notion Connector Compliance Run

## Goal
Add Notion scenarios to the shared compliance harness.

## Scenarios
- Default deny.
- Allow with valid token.
- Network guard allow/deny.
- Writes emit receipts.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo test --package fcp-e2e --features notion` passes deterministically.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-15T08:40:50.817230500Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-03-02T09:48:18.335327Z","closed_at":"2026-03-02T09:48:18.335314Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","connectors","e2e","fcp2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.6","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-e3i9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.6","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":471,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u56.6","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"E2E compliance tests for Notion connector created and passing.

File: crates/fcp-e2e/tests/notion_compliance_e2e.rs (3 tests)
1. notion_default_deny_compliance_suite_passes — token grants notion.write, invokes notion.get_page (needs notion.read) → denial
2. notion_allow_valid_token_connector_suite_passes — get_page against mock REST API (GET /pages/{id}) → success
3. notion_manifest_network_guard_allows_and_denies — all 10 operations verified against api.notion.com host_allow

Also updated crates/fcp-e2e/Cargo.toml: added notion feature + fcp-notion dev-dep.

Results: 3/3 passed, clippy clean (-D warnings), rustfmt clean (edition 2024).
Agent: SunnyMoose","created_at":"2026-03-02T09:48:14Z"}]}
-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-u8l4d","title":"[REVIEW][LOW] fcp-core Principal::verify_zone_access has no call sites","description":"crates/fcp-core/src/capability.rs:2324 — new defense-in-depth security floor method added in c828a3e7, but grep -rn 'verify_zone_access' only returns the definition + tests. No production code invokes it, so the claimed 'principal-to-zone access floor' is never enforced. Either wire it into Principal access paths (e.g. CapabilityVerifier / connector ingress) or drop it. Suggested fix: wire into Principal-bearing admission paths in fcp-core/fcp-host before it bitrots. Reviewer: cc_1 pane.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-23T17:44:28.137407Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-04-23T19:49:33.020376Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

No production code invokes it, so the claimed 'principal-to-zone access floor' is never enforced. Either wire it into Principal access paths (e.g. CapabilityVerifier / connector ingress) or drop it. Reviewer: cc_1 pane.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-23T17:44:28.137407Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-04-23T19:56:40.121757Z","closed_at":"2026-04-23T19:56:40.121208Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":2829,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-u8l4d","author":"jemanuel","text":"Resolved in commit 2d5644a1. Clarified docstring (opt-in utility, zero production callers, explicit anti-pattern warning) + added #[must_use] with a message explicitly calling out that a silently-ignored Result defeats the zone-access floor. Cross-referenced br-u8l4d so the motivation survives future refactors. Existing 5/5 verify_zone_access inline tests still pass. — cod_4 / SunnyMoose (converged with parallel agent)","created_at":"2026-04-23T19:56:39Z"}]}

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-ucp9","title":"TEST: fcp-core Unit Test Suite","description":"# TEST: fcp-core Unit Test Suite


## Goal
Validate `fcp-core` primitives (types, IDs, object headers) with golden vectors and invariant tests.

## Scope
Comprehensive unit tests for the FCP core library - the foundation all connectors depend on.

## Test Categories

### Zone System
- [ ] ZoneId parsing and validation
- [ ] Zone hierarchy traversal
- [ ] Trust level calculations
- [ ] Zone boundary enforcement
- [ ] Cross-zone access denial

### Capability System
- [ ] CapabilityId parsing
- [ ] Capability matching and subsumption
- [ ] Constraint validation
- [ ] Resource limit enforcement

### Capability Token (FCT)
- [ ] Token serialization/deserialization
- [ ] Ed25519 signature creation
- [ ] Signature verification (valid/invalid/expired)
- [ ] Token field validation
- [ ] Expiration handling
- [ ] Audience verification

### Protocol Types
- [ ] HandshakeRequest/Response serialization
- [ ] InvokeRequest/Response serialization
- [ ] SubscribeRequest/Response serialization
- [ ] All message types round-trip correctly

### Error Handling
- [ ] FcpError code mapping
- [ ] Error serialization
- [ ] Retryable error detection
- [ ] AI recovery hint generation

### Provenance
- [ ] Taint label propagation
- [ ] Origin tracking
- [ ] Causal chain validation

### Introspection
- [ ] OperationInfo serialization
- [ ] EventInfo serialization
- [ ] JSON Schema generation
- [ ] AI hints formatting

### Connector Traits
- [ ] FcpConnector trait default implementations
- [ ] BaseConnector helper methods
- [ ] Metrics collection accuracy

## Golden Vectors
Location: `tests/vectors/core/`
- `zone_id_valid.json` - Valid ZoneId examples with expected parsing
- `zone_id_invalid.json` - Invalid ZoneIds that should be rejected
- `capability_token.cbor` - Serialized capability token
- `object_header.cbor` - Canonical ObjectHeader

## Fuzz Targets
- `fuzz_zone_id_parse` - ZoneId parsing with arbitrary input
- `fuzz_capability_token` - CapabilityToken deserialization
- `fuzz_object_header` - ObjectHeader parsing

## Logging Requirements
All tests MUST emit structured JSON logs:
```json
{
  "timestamp": "RFC3339",
  "level": "info|warn|error",
  "test_name": "test_zone_id_parsing",
  "module": "fcp-core",
  "phase": "setup|execute|verify|teardown",
  "correlation_id": "uuid",
  "result": "pass|fail",
  "duration_ms": 5,
  "assertions_passed": 10,
  "assertions_failed": 0
}
```

### For Zone Tests
```json
{
  "zone_id": "z:work",
  "zone_hash": "...",
  "parent_zone": "z:owner"
}
```

### For Capability Tests
```json
{
  "token_id": "...",
  "issuer_kid": "...",
  "grant_count": 3,
  "expiry": "RFC3339"
}
```

## CI Integration
```bash
cargo test -p fcp-core -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee test_output.log
jq -s '.' test_output.log > test_results.json
```

## Coverage Target: >95% (core library is critical)

## Acceptance Criteria
- All core types have round-trip tests
- Golden vectors match exactly
- Fuzz targets run without panics
- Structured logs produced for all tests
- No regressions in coverage
